name: Head & Eye Protection
description: High-impact industrial helmets and specialized safety goggles designed to protect against falling objects, debris, and chemical splashes.

name: Respiratory Protection
description: Certified respirators and masks tailored for various industrial environments, ensuring protection against hazardous dust, fumes, and vapors.

name: Hearing Protection
description: Professional-grade earplugs and earmuffs with superior noise reduction ratings to prevent long-term hearing damage in high-decibel zones.

name: Fall Protection Gear
description: Full-body harnesses, shock-absorbing lanyards, and retractable lifelines engineered for maximum safety while working at significant heights.

name: Industrial Safety Footwear
description: Steel-toe and anti-static boots with slip-resistant soles, providing comprehensive protection from impact, compression, and electrical hazards.

name: Specialized Work Gloves
description: A wide range of gloves including nitrile for chemicals, leather for heat/abrasion, and cut-resistant options for handling sharp materials.
